title: nepeta subcaespitosa
intro: Nepeta subcaespitosa, also known as woolly catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. The health benefits of Nepeta subcaespitosa include its ability to calm digestive issues, relieve stress and anxiety, and even act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Nepeta subcaespitosa can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
